channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: ‘KPop Demon Hunters’ Is Your Best Animated Feature Oscar Winner
item.description: Netflix's biggest film of all time not only has a sequel in the works, but it's also got more awards on its shelf.

item.title: Playdate games to check out before the Catalog's 3-year anniversary sale ends
item.description: If your Playdate wishlist is anything like mine (endless), here's a good excuse to actually go ahead and free some of those games from limbo: Panic is running a sale across the Playdate Catalog to celebrate its three-year anniversary. Sure, the majority of Playdate games are pretty cheap as is, but they can still add up when you're on a wild purchasing spree. Ask me how I know! The sale started on March 5 and goes until March 19 at 1PM ET (10AM PT), so take advantage of the discounts while you can. There are 423 games available in the Catalog now, according to Panic, so if you're having troub...

item.title: This is probably the most powerful external GPU enclosure around right now — Pluggable's TBT5-AI is the first to explicitly target local LLM and workstation GPU
item.description: Plugable introduces a Thunderbolt 5 GPU enclosure allowing laptops to run large AI models locally using desktop graphics cards.

item.title: Oscars 2026 LIVE: Where to watch, Nominees, Cheapest ways to stream the 98th Academy Awards
item.description: Lights, camera, Oscars! Follow every win, surprise, and red-carpet moment live tonight with us

item.title: The 2026 TechRadar Australian PC Awards — all the winners revealed!
item.description: TechRadar has teamed up with experts from PC Gamer, Tom’s Guide, Windows Central and APC magazine to find the best PC gear of the year.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 World Baseball Classic online for free
item.description: How to watch World Baseball Classic for free. Live stream the 2026 World Baseball Classic for free from anywhere in the world.
